message:
fix: batch security, timeout, and UX fixes (#7192-#7235) (#7301)

* fix: harden Go backend security, timeouts, and resource cleanup

SECURITY:
- Add validateToken to handleMetricsHistory, handleDeviceInventory,
  handleInsightsEnrich, handleInsightsAI (#7223, #7228, #7231, #7233)
- Add io.LimitReader to handleSetKey and handlePredictionsAnalyze to
  prevent DoS via large request bodies (#7234, #7235)
- Gate kubectl auth to can-i/whoami only, blocking auth reconcile (#7204)
- Gate kubectl rollout to status/history only, blocking restart/undo (#7205)

RELIABILITY:
- Add 30s timeout to KubectlProxy.Execute via process kill timer (#7206)
- Add 60s timeout to gitStash/gitStashPop using exec.CommandContext (#7210)
- Guard rollbackGit against empty repoPath + add 30s timeout (#7211)
- Add eviction cap to Registry.selectedAgent map + RemoveSelectedAgent
  method to prevent unbounded memory growth (#7209)
- Return error from parseEnrichmentResponse when JSON lacks the
  enrichments key so callers fall back to rule-based enrichments (#7208)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: case-insensitive categories, project name trim, search improvements

- Case-insensitive orbit template category matching (#7232)
- Case-insensitive category fallback in project card mapping (#7230)
- Trim whitespace from project names before direct mapping lookup (#7229)
- Include sortBy and limit in usePods cache key to prevent cross-view
  stale data between dashboard and search views (#7218)
- Increase search pod index limit from 50 to 500 for more complete
  search results (#7217)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -128,8 +128,10 @@ export const ORBIT_TEMPLATES: OrbitTemplate[] = [
  * or match any of the provided categories.
  */
 export function getApplicableOrbitTemplates(categories: string[]): OrbitTemplate[] {
-  return ORBIT_TEMPLATES.filter(template =>
-    template.applicableCategories.includes('*') ||
-    (categories || []).some(cat => template.applicableCategories.includes(cat))
-  )
+  return ORBIT_TEMPLATES.filter(template => {
+    if (template.applicableCategories.includes('*')) return true
+    // Case-insensitive category matching (#7232)
+    const lowerApplicable = template.applicableCategories.map(c => c.toLowerCase())
+    return (categories || []).some(cat => lowerApplicable.includes(cat.toLowerCase()))
+  })
 }
